parameters.text: =📊 HR Leave Reminder — Monthly Run Complete  🔴 Critical: {{ $('Calculate Leave').all().filter(i => i.json.alertLevel === 'critical').length }} 🟡 Low: {{ $('Calculate Leave').all().filter(i => i.json.alertLevel === 'low').length }} 📧 Total emails sent: {{ $('Calculate Leave').all().length }} 📅 Run date: {{ new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', {year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric'}) }}

parameters.content:
HR Leave Balance Reminder Bot 

Monitors employee leave balances and sends personalized 
reminders based on burn rate analysis.

Burn Rate = leaveBalance / daysUntilRenewal
🔴 Critical: 0.5+
🟡 Low: 0.1 – 0.19
⏭️ No alert: below 0.1

DATA SOURCE
Default: Google Sheets
Replace this node with BambooHR / Workday / Personio
to connect your HRIS system.

PROCESSING ENGINE
Validates data, filters inactive employees,
skips new hires (< 90 days tenure),
calculates burn rate and alert level.

NOTIFICATIONS
Activate only ONE notification node.
07a → Slack: add your workspace credential
07b → Teams: add your Teams webhook URL
Both are pre-configured with HR summary message.
